items.title: GSK Will Replace CEO Walmsley With a Company Insider. The Stock Is Up.
items.description: Emma Walmsley has overseen eight turbulent years at he U.K. drugmaker. The firm announced Monday that she will be succeeded by GSK insider and drug industry stalwart Luke Miels.
